metadata.description: Naoki Yokomachi's personal Claude Code marketplace (skills & plugins for tech output workflows)

plugins.name: cadenza
plugins.description: A 5-phase gated pipeline for technical content creation. Each phase acts as a gate, enforcing think-before-write discipline. Produces a single format-agnostic Markdown output. Inspired by issue-first thinking in knowledge work.

plugins.name: cadenza-personal
plugins.description: Personal extension to cadenza: takes the format-agnostic output.md and finishes it for specific publishing targets (Zenn / deck-style markdown for AI slide tools / LT). Not for OSS distribution.
